Title: Would It Kill You to Laugh?
Writer: Kate Berlant, Andrew DeYoung, John Early
Actors: Kate Berlant, John Early, Meredith Vieira
Plot: Features Kate Berlant and John Early, as they play exaggerated versions of themselves and reunite after suffering a public falling out several years ago.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Primetime Emmy. 3 nominations total
